# TreeView

Navigates hierarchical items with expand/collapse, selection, and full keyboard support.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/tree-view
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="tree-view" example={0} code={`<DeviceTree />`} />

```tsx
<DeviceTree />
```

## Props

| Prop               | Type                           | Required | Default | Description                       |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------ | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------- |
| `nodes`            | `readonly TreeNode[]`          | Yes      | -       | -                                 |
| `expanded`         | `readonly string[]`            | No       | -       | Expanded branch ids (controlled). |
| `defaultExpanded`  | `readonly string[]`            | No       | -       | -                                 |
| `onExpandedChange` | `(expanded: string[]) => void` | No       | -       | -                                 |
| `selected`         | `string`                       | No       | -       | Selected node id (controlled).    |
| `defaultSelected`  | `string`                       | No       | -       | -                                 |
| `onSelect`         | `(id: string) => void`         | No       | -       | -                                 |
| `'aria-label'`     | `string`                       | No       | -       | Accessible name for the tree.     |

## Variants

No recipe variants are documented for this component.
